title: Today's Tech Brief: The new Halide camera app launches with film looks and an upgraded photo editor
summary: A brief look at the latest tech news, including the launch of Halide Mark III and Facebook's new 'Plus' subscription.

body.text: I'm Leo Stone, and welcome to today's tech brief. I've got a couple of interesting stories to share with you from the world of technology. First up, a new version of the Halide camera app has launched, bringing with it some exciting features that photography enthusiasts will love. I have to say, I'm intrigued by the film looks - who doesn't want their photos to have that vintage vibe?

My quick read: today's tech stories are less about one giant thunderclap and more about a lively weather pattern. A little platform drama here, a little artificial intelligence irony there, and suddenly the industry has enough material for a very caffeinated morning show.

sources.title: The new Halide camera app launches with film looks and an upgraded photo editor
Facebook launches a ‘Plus’ subscription that gives you extra features
